title: Harvey & Mason 10 Festive Family Santa Christmas Crackers - Reindeer Tree Novelty Kids Game, Xmas Dinner Party Celebration
features: MEASUREMENTS: Each cracker measures: 30.48cm/12inch. Packaging and cracker shell are 100% recyclable & no plastic contents.
ECO-FRIENDLY: Reduce waste this holiday season with these eco-friendly Christmas crackers. All packaging, crackers and gifts are fully recyclable!
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 10 luxury Christmas Crackers, finished with a red curling ribbon. Each cracker is filled with a gift, hat and motto.
DESIGN: These exquisite crackers feature a festive Santa and Reindeer design in red and white with metallic detail. A great addition to your dinner table this Christmas.
GIFTS: Each cracker contains a Christmas themed paper gift such as a jigsaw, origami, sudoku and more! Each gift is fully recyclable. (gifts may vary).
